r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Some questions are too embarrassing to ask anyone
emotional_amplifiers: Because these are questions that male doctors often can't answer - or simply don't take the time to answer - we sought the expertise of over 100 of the top women doctors, researchers, therapists, psychologists and health experts throughout the United States.
Male doctors don't understand or take time for women's health questions

unique_differentiators: Women experts have compiled answers written by women, for women

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Get honest woman-to-woman answers privately at home

headline.primary_headline: I couldn't ask my mother these questions!
headline.promise_compression: Answers to embarrassing health questions women can't ask anyone else

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What questions are too embarrassing to ask?
curiosity_architecture.resolution_promise: 100+ women experts answer the questions you can't ask others

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Some health questions are too personal to ask anyone
schema_analysis.new_schema: Women experts have compiled answers to every question you're afraid to ask
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: 100 women experts + specific page references + free trial

headline.vsl_adaptation: What if you could finally get answers to those health questions you're too embarrassed to ask your mother, your best friend, or even your doctor?

lead.opening_verbatim: Dear Debora, I couldn't ask my mother these questions! Here goes, I've been married to a wonderful man for 8 years. During our first year together we were intimate 4 or 5 times a week. Now it seems like 4 or 5 times a year! Are we drifting apart, or simply getting too old?
lead.editor_persona: Debora Tkac, Executive Editor of PREVENTION Magazine Health Books
lead.transition_to_body: Dear N.J., Probably neither. Sounds to me like ISD, or inhibited desire...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Male doctors often can't answer women's health questions - or don't take the time to. This encyclopedia was created by consulting over 100 of the top women doctors, researchers, therapists, psychologists and health experts to provide woman-to-woman answers.

proof_elements.verbatim: over 100 of the top women doctors, researchers, therapists, psychologists and health experts
Debora Tkac is the Executive Editor of PREVENTION Magazine Health Books
Over one million women have already been inspired and guided by the WOMEN'S ENCYCLOPEDIA

sample_questions.question: We were intimate 4-5 times a week, now 4-5 times a year. Are we drifting apart?
sample_questions.answer_preview: ISD (inhibited desire) - turn to page 242 for what top therapists recommend

sample_questions.question: Is it impossible to get from food all the nutrients we women need?
sample_questions.answer_preview: Biggest dietary challenge is iron, zinc and calcium - but supplements not always best

sample_questions.question: I have lumps in my breasts. Not all lumps are cancer but I'm scared!
sample_questions.answer_preview: Go to doctor. Most lumps are FBD (fibrocystic breast disease). We describe which lumps are dangerous vs harmless

sample_questions.question: What is the 'female weight switch' to help lose weight?
sample_questions.answer_preview: It's no fad - secret words that turn on weight-loss power plus five research secrets

sample_questions.question: I need to learn to say NO. People take advantage of my good nature!
sample_questions.answer_preview: The best way to say 'No' that really works is in the companion book

narrative_flow.expert_credibility: over 100 of the top women doctors, researchers, therapists, psychologists and health experts throughout the United States

offer.product_name: Women's Encyclopedia of Health and Emotional Healing

price_structure.payment_plan: four easy installments of $6.99 each plus postage and handling

offer.bonus: The Busy Woman's Survival Guide - FREE, yours to keep regardless
offer.guarantee: Return book at end of period and owe nothing

richs_formula_elements.old_way: Struggle with embarrassing questions alone or ask unhelpful male doctors
richs_formula_elements.new_discovery: 100+ women experts compiled answers to thousands of women's questions

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Excellent intimate Q&A format for sensitive topic
notable_elements: The confession headline immediately validates reader's own embarrassed questions
Q&A format allows addressing multiple topics without seeming scattered
Woman-to-woman positioning against male doctors is effective enemy clarity
Editor persona makes it feel like private correspondence
extraction_notes.key_insight: The Q&A format with 'Dear Debora' letters makes advertising feel like intimate correspondence - readers see their own questions reflected in the sample letters
